summary: The AFC U20 Asian Cup 2025 and Sheffield Shield 2024-25 have concluded or are not scheduled for today. The main live cricket event appears to be the Pakistan National T20 Cup Final (KRW vs ABT), which is mapped to the first Chandigarh T20 stream. The Legends League Cricket match (IC vs IT) is also scheduled for later today.
